title: Blast-Radius Containment: a reproducible Monte Carlo model of ransomware lateral propagation under Zero Trust microsegmentation
description: Standalone, deterministic Monte Carlo model quantifying the blast radius of ransomware lateral propagation and its containment by Zero Trust microsegmentation (default-deny east-west) plus behavioral detection. Motivated by the 2024 Change Healthcare ransomware incident. Deterministic (fixed seeds) with a SHA-256 chain-of-truth and a self-contained Colab replication notebook.

creators.name: Flores, Carlos Ulisses
creators.affiliation: Codex Hash Research Laboratory, Codex Hash Ltda., Brazil
